headline: How The Eli Lilly (LLY) Obesity And Diabetes Story Is Reframing The Investment Narrative
summary: Eli Lilly’s modelled fair value has been trimmed slightly from US$1,211.21 to US$1,209.21 per share, a very small move that still attracted attention given the stock’s high profile in obesity and diabetes. That modest change sits alongside research that focuses on GLP-1 pricing, new approvals such as Foundayo, and differing views on how much of the obesity opportunity is already reflected in current valuations. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting assumptions and keep up...
